hero.subtitle: I'm **Santiago Romero** — Full Stack Developer. I design and develop modern web applications that don't just work, they scale. From backend to frontend, from prototype to production.

about.label: ABOUT ME
about.p1: I'm Santiago Romero, a Full Stack Developer from Bucaramanga, Colombia. I am driven by the belief that well-written code can transform businesses and simplify lives.
about.p2: I work with the full stack — frontend, backend, and databases — because understanding the entire system is what allows me to make better decisions. I don't just want things to work; I want them to be well-built.
about.p3: When I'm not coding, I'm learning something new. There's always a technology to explore, a problem to solve, or a project to improve.

principles.clean_code: Clean Code — I write code that anyone can understand
principles.performance: Performance — Fast, smooth, and efficient applications
principles.ui_ux: UI/UX Design — Intuitive interfaces that enhance the experience
principles.continuous_learning: Continuous learning — Constantly evolving as a developer

about.open_to: Open to freelance projects, collaborations and hybrid or remote opportunities.

skills.label: TECH STACK
skills.subtitle: A modern full-stack toolkit to build complete applications, from idea to production.
skills.learning_desc: Always learning and exploring new technologies. Have a project that requires something specific?

projects.label: CASE STUDIES
projects.subtitle: Real systems built with focus on functionality, usability and value.

velvet.title: Velvet & Co — Web Store
velvet.description: Responsive web application that consumes a public product API with a shopping cart and a fluid user experience.
velvet.problem: Need for a modern web store that dynamically displayed products, allowed filtering, and maintained a persistent cart without its own backend.

gym.title: GymMaster CLI — Gym Management System
gym.description: Complete command-line gym management system with MongoDB database and advanced operations.
gym.problem: A gym needed to manage clients, plans, payments, and progress from a single robust and reliable tool without an expensive graphical interface.
solution: Complete CRUD for clients and plans

dataflix.title: DataFlix — Database Educational Platform
dataflix.description: Web platform to learn databases from scratch with courses, quizzes, and personalized progress tracking.
dataflix.problem: There was no free, visual, and accessible platform to learn databases practically and autonomously.

pizza.title: Pizza y Punto — Management System
pizza.description: Complete ERP for pizzerias with order control, inventory, drivers, and real-time sales analysis.
pizza.problem: A pizzeria needed to centralize the management of orders, inventory, drivers, and billing in a single efficient and reliable system.

distrib-app.title: DistribApp — Management System for Distributors
distrib-app.description: Complete mobile app for panela distributors with real-time control of sales, inventory, clients, and accounting from a smartphone.
distrib-app.problem: A panela distributor in Colombia managed all their sales and inventory in physical notebooks, causing information loss, difficulty in calculating profits, and lack of total control over the business.

projects.github_desc: Explore my GitHub for more projects and code.

contact.label: CONTACT
contact.subtitle: I'm available for freelance projects, collaborations and opportunities. Write me and let's talk about how I can help you.
contact.connect_desc: Follow me to see my work and technical content.
contact.response_note: I respond within 24 hours. For urgent projects, WhatsApp is the best option.

footer.description: Full Stack Developer. I build web applications with clean code and modern architecture.
footer.built_with: Designed and developed with React + Vite + Framer Motion
